title: Verify and fix agentic-sense external package wiring
description: DBB shows agentic-sense still uses '#agentic-sense' import map and is missing from package.json. Verify: 1) grep -r '#agentic-sense' src/ should return nothing, 2) package.json should list agentic-sense as dependency. Fix any remaining issues. After developer wires it, tester verifies.
